purpose: Add a reactive (subscribe/getSnapshot/loaded-flag/cancel) read layer over the existing IndexedDB-backed outbound join-request record store, without changing its wire behavior, keys, TTL, or auto-accept correlation semantics.

public_api.name: OutboundJoinRequestRecord
public_api.signature: interface { nonce: string; adminPubkeyHex: string; groupName: string; sentAt: number }

public_api.name: saveOutboundJoinRequest
public_api.description: Pre-existing persist funnel; now also recomputes the cached snapshot and emits exactly once before returning (AC-STORE-4).

public_api.name: deleteOutboundJoinRequest
public_api.description: Pre-existing delete funnel; now also recomputes the cached snapshot and emits exactly once before returning (AC-STORE-4). This is the funnel welcomeSubscription.ts:553's auto-accept path already calls — made reactive with zero edits to that file.

public_api.name: clearAllOutboundJoinRequests
public_api.description: Pre-existing dead-code account-wide reset; recomputes + emits too for funnel consistency, but remains unwired (not part of this story's tested behavior).

public_api.name: subscribe
public_api.description: NEW (AC-STORE-1). Adds listener to _listeners; on first subscribe (if not yet loaded), kicks the async initial IDB load. Returns an unsubscribe function.

public_api.name: getSnapshot
public_api.description: NEW (AC-STORE-1, AC-STORE-2). Synchronous; returns the cached, TTL-filtered _snapshot. Stable reference until the record set changes.

public_api.name: getServerSnapshot
public_api.description: NEW. SSR/static-export-safe stable empty array, mirroring pendingInvitations/unreadStore.

public_api.name: cancelOutboundJoinRequest
public_api.description: NEW (AC-STORE-5). The only sanctioned UI-facing delete entry point; delegates to deleteOutboundJoinRequest(nonce).

public_api.name: useOutboundJoinRequests
public_api.description: NEW. useSyncExternalStore(subscribe, getSnapshot, getServerSnapshot) wrapper, mirroring useUnreadCounts. Also exposes isOutboundJoinRequestsLoaded() as `loaded` for consumers (React hook — imports React only in this module).

dependencies_forbidden: app/pages/groups.tsx and any component must not import idb-keyval directly to reach this store; they use subscribe/getSnapshot/useOutboundJoinRequests/cancelOutboundJoinRequest exclusively
welcomeSubscription.ts is NOT edited by this story
